perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video starts with a young woman standing in a Costco supermarket aisle, holding a large red bag of frozen shrimp. She smiles and points excitedly at the bag while moving it closer to the camera. (2) The camera transitions to close-up shots of the product label which reads "WILD ARGENTINE RED SHRIMP". A male hand enters the frame several times to point at specific details on the packaging. (3) The scene shifts to a kitchen environment where several peeled red shrimp are being sautéed in a black pan with garlic cloves. The pan is shaken to flip the shrimp as they cook and turn opaque.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) Fast-paced, upbeat electronic pop music starts immediately. A young woman's high-pitched and excited voice describes the product's features. (2) A male voice occasionally responds and adds comments about the size and price in a conversational tone. (3) As the cooking scene begins, a prominent sizzling sound effect of oil in a hot pan is layered over the background music, which remains continuous until the end.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Decorative Text: "COSTCO WHOLESALE" and "最新款 野生阿根廷 特大紅蝦仁" (New Arrival: Wild Argentine Extra Large Red Shrimp) appear in large, colorful fonts. (2) Functional Text: Subtitles translate the dialogue regarding the weight ("908公克"), the price ("825塊錢"), and preparation tips. (3) Hook Text: "請看下集食用心得" (Please see the next episode for tasting experience) appears at the bottom during the cooking scene.

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Intro/Product showcase at store -> Information/Close-up -> Cooking demonstration -> CTA

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 female main creator onscreen, 1 male hand appearing to point at the product
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: A young Asian woman with long dark hair, wearing a white ruffled cardigan over a brown pleated dress.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: The initial scenes are shot in a Costco freezer section with bright red product displays. The latter scenes are shot on a modern kitchen stovetop with a grey tiled backsplash.

narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: The video serves as a shopping recommendation and cooking preview for Costco's frozen Argentine red shrimp. It aims to convince viewers of the product's quality and value by showcasing its size, price, and ease of preparation.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: Reviewing a specific branded product positively with detailed pricing and unboxing style presentation.

social_sociology_tags.uniqueSignatures: High-energy variety-show style text overlays and fast-paced dual-voice commentary.
social_sociology_tags.freeDescribe: The content follows a typical 'Costco Finds' vlog format popular in Taiwan, characterized by high-speed narration and immediate cut-to-cooking demos.
